mapper.select: select * from files where target_id = #{id} and target_type='campaign' and is_deleted = 'N';
select * from files where target_id = #{id} and target_type=#{targetType} and is_deleted = 'N';
select user_no from user_campaign where campaign_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update files set is_deleted = 'Y' where target_id = #{id} and target_type = 'profile' and is_deleted = 'N';
mapper.select: select * from files where target_id = #{id} and target_type='BANNER' and is_deleted = 'N';
select * from files where target_type='campaign' and is_deleted = 'N';

SELECT uc.campaign_id, uc.user_id, uc.user_No, u.user_nm, u.phone_Num, c.campaign_title, c.leader_pay, (CASE WHEN c.type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN c.type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN c.type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, (CASE WHEN uc.status = '0' THEN '대기' WHEN uc.status = '1' THEN '출근' WHEN uc.status = '2' THEN '퇴근' WHEN uc.status = '3' THEN '지각' WHEN uc.status = '4' THEN '결근' WHEN uc.status = '5' THEN '무단' ELSE '없음' END) as status_nm, ph.reason_info, c.time_segment, uc.apply_date, ph.amount, -- 테이블명 명시가 누락되었다면 ph. 추가 u.resident_Num, uc.IS_DELETED FROM user_campaign uc LEFT OUTER JOIN user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN campaign c ON uc.campaign_id = c.campaign_id LEFT OUTER JOIN point_history ph ON uc.campaign_id = ph.campaign_id AND uc.user_no = ph.user_id -- 💡 [핵심 추가] 특이사항을 등록한 유저 아이디가 일치해야 함! AND ph.category = 'OVERPAY' AND ph.is_deleted = 'N' -- 💡 [핵심 이동] 조인 조건으로 넣어야 ph 데이터가 있을 때만 체크합니다! WHERE uc.campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND DATE(apply_date) = #{applyDate} AND uc.time_segment = #{timeSegment} AND uc.is_deleted = 'N'
